2196590.name: Krytix
2196590.description: Krytix is a game taking place in a futuristic combat simulator where you wake up from unconsciousness with no clue about the origin of your situation, run 'n gun your way out of the levels and discover the purpose of your ultimate quest. Run 'n gun across different levels where you are hunted down by mysterious highly technological robots who will not hesitate to shoot you down on sight, sneak through levels or destroy everything on your path are the choices for all levels, bringing you to a different outcome for every levels. Use technological weaponry, hacking powers and elemental magic to not only defeat your enemies but also interact with the physics-based environment. Props, rag-dolls and destructible environment.
2196590.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
